title: Whipped Ricotta Dip with Spices and Yummi Pops Nacho Jalapeño Cream
ingredients: Yummi Pops Nacho Jalapeño Cream for serving
instructions: Place the ricotta cheese in a food processor or blender and process until smooth and airy.
Add the olive oil, dried spices, salt, and pepper and process again until combined.
Serve the dip in a bowl, finish with a drizzle of olive oil on top, and accompany with Yummi Pops Nacho Jalapeño Cream for dipping.
chef_tips: Make sure the ricotta is at room temperature for a smoother, creamier whipped texture.
Try oregano, thyme, or smoked paprika to add a special depth of flavor to the dip.
Serve the dip in a wide, shallow bowl so the Yummi Pops are easy to dip without breaking.
